key.name: poll-interval-minutes
key.description: How often the extension polls for match updates. Range 1-30 minutes.

key.name: event-match-start
key.description: Send a notification when a subscribed match kicks off.

key.name: event-goal
key.description: Send a notification for every goal in subscribed matches.

key.name: event-yellow-card
key.description: Send a notification when a player receives a yellow card.

key.name: event-red-card
key.description: Send a notification when a player receives a red card (direct or second yellow).

key.name: event-substitution
key.description: Send a notification for each substitution. Disabled by default to avoid noise — most matches have 6-10 substitutions per game.

key.name: event-half-time-end
key.description: Send a notification when the first half ends.

key.name: event-second-half-start
key.description: Send a notification when the second half begins.

key.name: event-match-end
key.description: Send a notification when the match ends.

key.name: event-extra-time
key.description: Send a notification when extra time starts in knockout matches.

key.name: event-penalties
key.description: Send a notification when a penalty shootout begins and for each penalty.

key.name: catalog-cache-json
key.description: JSON snapshot of leagues and teams as returned by the upstream API. Refreshed every 7 days.

key.name: catalog-fetched-at
key.description: UNIX timestamp (seconds) of the last successful catalog refresh.

key.name: force-check-trigger
key.description: Bumped by the preferences UI to ask the background poller to run immediately.

key.name: replay-dir
key.description: If non-empty, sports-api.js reads scoreboard/summary responses from JSON fixtures under this directory instead of fetching from the network. Used for development and integration testing. Empty string disables replay mode.
